requests.what_i_will_do_with_result: Incorporate themes of shadow assassination and Vhaeraunite rebellion into the faction description.
requests.query: Shadow assassins, Vhaeraun worship, drow males rebelling against matriarchy

requests.what_i_will_do_with_result: Define the pragmatic and mercenary nature of this drow faction.
requests.query: Elite drow mercenaries, Jarlaxle Baenre, pragmatic drow outcasts

requests.what_i_will_do_with_result: Shape the motives of an Illithid expedition force in the Underdark.
requests.query: Illithid city expansion, mind flayers expedition, elder brain influence

requests.what_i_will_do_with_result: Develop a unique personality and agenda for a deep dragon living near the city.
requests.query: Underdark dragons, hoarders of secrets, manipulation from the shadows

requests.what_i_will_do_with_result: Create a faction representing a single but influential bureaucrat.
requests.query: Petty bureaucrat with disproportionate power, corrupt administrator

requests.what_i_will_do_with_result: Define the relationship between the drow city and gray dwarf traders.
requests.query: Stoic underdark merchants, deep gnome rivals, duergar economy

requests.what_i_will_do_with_result: Establish a chaotic and dangerous religious threat within the city.
requests.query: Slime and ooze worship, chaotic underdark cult, Ghaunadaur

requests.what_i_will_do_with_result: Introduce a faction of good-aligned drow working in secret.
requests.query: Good drow surface-reachers, secret worship of the moon goddess Eilistraee

requests.what_i_will_do_with_result: Create a non-drow faction with a hive-mind and unique goals.
requests.query: Fungal hive mind, peaceful but xenophobic colony, myconid circle

requests.what_i_will_do_with_result: Add a surface-world criminal organization trying to gain a foothold.
requests.query: Black Network expansion, surface spies in underdark, Zhentarim drow operations
